worm_lock_default_days.description: Default WORM lock period in days applied when no per-doctype rule specifies one

delete_policy.description: Default action when retention period expires and no per-doctype override is set

sweep_schedule_cron.description: Cron expression for the retention sweep job (e.g. '30 2 * * *')

alert_on_breach.description: Send an alert when a document that should have been purged is still present

retention_audit_retention_days.description: How long to keep retention audit log rows before they are archived
